heading: Acquisition of statistical data on child abuse
label: 41302 Acquisition of statistical data on child abuse
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified as a note under , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 5101 of Title 42

children.heading: Data acquisition for 1987 and 1988
children.label: a Data acquisition for 1987 and 1988
children.text: The Attorney General shall acquire from criminal justice agencies statistical data, for the calendar years 1987 and 1988, about the incidence of child abuse, including child sexual abuse, and shall publish annually a summary of such data.

children.heading: Modification of uniform crime reporting program
children.label: b Modification of uniform crime reporting program

children.text: As soon as practicable, but in no case later than , the Attorney General shall modify the uniform crime reporting program in the Federal Bureau of Investigation to include data on the age of the victim of the offense and the relationship, if any, of the victim to the offender, for types of offenses that may involve child abuse, including child sexual abuse.January 1, 1989

children.label: A
children.text: 10 years after the date it is made; or

children.label: B
children.text: such ending date as may be set by the Attorney General.
